name: santos-care-monorepo
description: Heal India Medi Tourism monorepo — public site (santos.care) + ops hub (ops.santos.care)

scripts.build: npm run build:public && npm run build:ops
scripts.lint: npm run lint:public && npm run lint:ops
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:public && npm run typecheck:ops
scripts.install:all: cd public-site && npm install && cd ../santocare-ops && npm install
